name: Democrats.org
subject: No better time to say it: "Thank you"
body:
Add your name to thank President Obama **We're so thankful for everything we've accomplished together -- and we wanted to give you the opportunity to say "thanks, Obama" yourself. Just add your note here, and we'll pass it along:

** **[THANKS, OBAMA](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+THANKS+OBAMA&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc_f&source=em_20161226_dnc_f")**
[](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc_f&source=em_20161226_dnc_f") [](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc_f&source=em_20161226_dnc_f")
**[http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama](http://my.democrats. "https://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+httpmydemocratsorgThankYouPresidentObama&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc_f&source=em_20161226_dnc_f")**

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2a3/4067b0a/22befb99d/7e06f96e/3320211466/VEsD/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc_f&source=em_20161226_dnc_f"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2a3/4067b0a/22befb99d/7e06f96f/3320211466/VEsA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc_f&source=em_20161226_dnc_f"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2a3/4067b0a/22befb99d/7e06f96c/3320211466/VEsB/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc_f&source=em_20161226_dnc_f") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2a3/4067b0a/22befb99d/7e06f96d/3320211466/VEsO/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc_f&source=em_20161226_dnc_f"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|

name: Official DSCC Membership
subject: You voted, we listened [membership card]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
Thousands of grassroots Democrats voted to select our official 2017 membership card. Check out the winning design and get your personalized card today. [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161226-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---
_**ANNOUNCING: The Official 2017 DSCC Membership Card!**_
[**Pitch in any amount to get your personalized card, Friend >> **](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161226-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
This is incredible, Friend -- Thousands of grassroots Democrats voted to select our official 2017 membership card! And without further delay, the winning design is...

| [](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161226-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")
---

The vote may have come down to the wire but one thing was crystal clear: Democrats are ALL IN to defend President Obama's legacy and fight for opportunity, equality, and progress in the year ahead. So now's your chance to make it official by getting your 2017 membership card.

[**Just make a grassroots gift of ANY amount today and we 'll automatically register you as an OFFICIAL DSCC MEMBER for 2017 - and send you your personalized membership card with the winning design (shipping included!).**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161226-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Friend, 2017 is fast approaching and it's critical that we're united stronger than ever to take on Donald Trump and the GOP congress. **[Join grassroots Democrats everywhere by activating your membership today>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161226-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks,
Team DSCC

**A quick note on donations, Friend:**

We're hard at work readying resources for the fight ahead -- and with 99% of our contributions coming from grassroots Democrats giving under $200, your support could not be more important to our efforts.

Please consider a contribution of any amount today. We can elect a Senate that will protect our values from right-wing extremists, but only if supporters like you have our back.

[**Contribute**](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/membership-2017?refcode=DPE-20161226-OfficialMembership-ProsHV&recurring=auto&recur_weekly=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed55/2b07114c/4143110a/73683887/2159763216/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed55/2b07114c/4143110a/73683886/2159763216/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](https://secure.dscc.org/page/m/3954ed55/2b07114c/4143110a/73683881/2159763216/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support. Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.
---

name: Official Democratic Record
subject: Become a 2016 donor
body:
Your supporter record ** OFFICIAL 2016 SUPPORTER RECORD
NAME: On file
EMAIL: dpwillis67@gmail.com
2016 DONOR: Not yet

**This year is coming to an end, and we need to know you're committed to fighting back against the GOP and the Trump administration. Will you become a 2016 donor?

** **[CHIP IN](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06bafc/2256700472/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+CHIP+IN&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd")****
[](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06bafd/2256700472/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06bafa/2256700472/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06bafb/2256700472/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06baf8/2256700472/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06baf9/2256700472/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd") [](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba86/2256700472/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd")
**If you've saved your payment information, your donation will go through immediately.

[ QUICK DONATE: $3](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba87/2256700472/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+QUICK+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $10](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba84/2256700472/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+QUICK+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $25](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba85/2256700472/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+QUICK+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $50](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba82/2256700472/VEsHBA/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+QUICK+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd")
[QUICK DONATE: $100](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba83/2256700472/VEsHBw/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+QUICK+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd")
**Or donate another amount:**

**[https://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba80/2256700472/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VFgwTlZVMVJQVFY5R1NVVk1SRnR6YkhWblBXdGxlV052WkdWZEpTVT0iOiIifQ==/ "http://my.democrats.org/2016-Deadline1?keycode=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+httpsmydemocratsorg2016Deadline&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd")****

\--------
If you've made a recent online contribution, contributed by check or by mail, or made a purchase at store.democrats.org, this may not be reflected in your online donor record -- but thank you for your support!

|
---|---

Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington DC 20003 and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba81/2256700472/VEsHAQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/user/manage?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=14+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd"). Our email list is the best way we have of staying in regular contact with supporters like you across the country and letting you know about the work President Obama and other Democrats are doing. If you like staying in touch, but want to receive only the most important messages, click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba8e/2256700472/VEsHAA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/signup/less-email?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd"). Click [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba8f/2256700472/VEsHAw/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=16+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd") to unsubscribe from our supporter list, but if you leave, it will be harder for you to stay involved in the organization that you've been such a critical part of. This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c2cf/4067b0a/22ba1bcf2/7e06ba8c/2256700472/VEsHAg/ "http://my.democrats.org/page/s/contact-the-democrats?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=17+-+here&utm_campaign=em_20161226_dnc2_nd&source=em_20161226_dnc2_nd"), or just reply to this email! Thanks for supporting President Obama and other Democrats.

|
